shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The compact button uses the same dark slate frame and gold accent language as the larger HUD pieces.
differences: The icon centers a dotted route glyph inside a 40x40px plate.
A teal inner glow marks the enabled state and an orange outline supports warning states.
The button keeps a thicker 2px outer frame than the interior dots.

context.usage: Top-right toggle used to enable or disable hazard route prediction.

specs.shading: Flat frame with a bright inner glow ring.

acceptance_criteria: Button texture size is exactly 40x40px with a centered route icon.
The route icon remains readable at native scale and under hover tint.
The outer frame stays at least 2px thick on all sides.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle button with interaction state colors driven by a UI state component.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_prediction_toggle_button_40x40.png during the Loading state and pair it with state-driven tint updates.
runtime_notes: Keep hover and pressed feedback in color modulation.
Anchor the button in screen space.
Expose the enabled state through a dedicated resource.
